title: Supplemental UML Models for a Use Case
description: A diagram showing the primary UML models that are used to detail and supplement the information captured in a Use Case, moving from high-level requirements to system design.
relationships: A Use Case Diagram defines the high-level functionality and actors. Activity Diagrams detail the workflow and logic of a use case. Sequence Diagrams show the interaction between objects over time for a scenario. State Machine Diagrams model the lifecycle of a critical object within a use case. Class Diagrams define the static structure of the system objects involved. Communication Diagrams offer an alternative view of object interactions, emphasizing links.
